summary: Russian forces destroyed Ukrainian unmanned boats near Tendrov Spit and the Dnipro River mouth using FPV drones. The "Elka" anti-drone system conducted multiple kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs in the special military operation zone during spring 2026. On March 13, 2026, the "Rubicon" Center reported 132 destroyed targets, including 35.4% unmanned systems, while March 12 saw 111 targets destroyed across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, with operations targeting Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and control points. Ukrainian forces are deploying advanced AI-powered loitering munitions like the HX-2 and offering partners access to combat data for AI training, while Russian forces face challenges countering Ukrainian FPV drones capable of striking targets up to 100km behind lines.
